The '''Mark II assault droid''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] model.

==Characteristics==
Quadrupedal in form, this battle droid was armed for melee combat, featuring two bludgeoning armatures that could deliver brutal blunt-force trauma to unarmored or unprepared opponents. These droids were sometimes outfitted with body-mounted energy [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]].

==History==
It was used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and later the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] prior to and during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and [[Jedi Civil War]]. These droids also sometimes fell into the hands of [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gangs]], such as the [[Hidden Beks]] and [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Mark I assault droid|Assault droid Mark I]] is at one point in [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] mistakenly referred to as the Mark II, but it should not be confused with this model.
